name: project-kit
description: Say "new project" → a perfectly-prepared project folder. Grills the plan to a Definition of Ready, then auto-scaffolds files, memory, sub-agents & tooling.

plugins.name: project-kit
plugins.description: The new-project bootstrapper + 16 type sub-skills + the build-business 7-day ultraskill. Tell Claude 'neues Projekt' and it grills then scaffolds.
